meta.name: Subikesh P S
meta.description: Personal portfolio of Subikesh P S — Software Engineer 2 (Android) at Intuit, working on Kotlin Multiplatform, Jetpack Compose, and AI-powered experiences.

content: I am currently working as a Software Engineer 2 - Android at Intuit, building mobile experiences for TurboTax and QuickBooks customers. I completed my Bachelor's in SRM Easwari Engineering College majoring in Computer Science and Engineering. I love crafting performant, well-architected Android apps using Kotlin Multiplatform, Jetpack Compose, and Clean Architecture, and I enjoy exploring the intersection of mobile and AI.

I am always curious about the things I see and use, and I enjoy learning them. Lately, that curiosity has pulled me deeper into AI engineering — building RAG pipelines, working with vector databases, and shipping AI-powered features end to end. I like to work on projects out of my comfort zone so I can learn while building, and I am always looking forward to opportunities to grow my skills.

projects.title: NewsBuddy - AI News Companion
projects.description: A cross-platform AI news companion app that delivers daily briefings across 8 categories with follow-up conversational Q&A and source attribution.
points: Built and shipped using Kotlin Multiplatform and Jetpack Compose, with AI-generated daily briefings and conversational Q&A backed by source attribution.
Implemented Clean Architecture with MVVM, Kotlin Coroutines and Flows for reactive state management, and Ktor for networking — with all chat data persisted on-device for user privacy.
Engineered a Django REST backend with a RAG pipeline using Gemini embeddings and a Qdrant vector database, enabling semantic search across daily articles to power context-aware AI responses.

projects.title: Ecommerce Application
projects.description: An application that gets products data from Flipkart affiliate API and implements the ecommerce workflow with cart, wishlisting, and buying products.
points: Used retrofit and room db for network and database calls
Learned dependency injection using dagger along with many architectural patterns

projects.title: Code Database
projects.description: An application to store coding questions and track your progress on the road to become an expert programmer.
points: Implemented the MVT design pattern in Django, Python and designed the database with MySQL database.
A REST API is created using django-rest-framework to do CRUD operations on the website.
Created an Android app which consumes the hosted REST API for list, search and user login functionalities.
Hosted it in python-anywhere with MySQL database as an open-source app

projects.title: Digit Recognizer
projects.description: An app to predict hand-written digits drawn by user using deep learning. The project is done from scratch using numpy and pandas libraries in python.

projects.title: Dental Data Statistics
projects.description: An application to give a neat GUI for inserting, updating and displaying the data graphically and generating a report from the data given from a dental hospital. The app is currently being used by SRM dental hospital for tracking patient records.

projects.title: Tic-Tac-Toe AI
projects.description: The game tic-tac-toe for two player and single player - with AI created using minimax algorithm made using python.

projects.title: Minesweeper
projects.description: A strategic single-player game to flag the mines in the board with the clues about neighboring mines. It is created using python in an object-oriented design.

ol.title: Virtual Expert Platform
ul: Improved user experience for TurboTax and QuickBooks customers by resolving critical bugs in VEP mobile SDKs (chat, video, screenshare), ensuring reliable and streamlined connections to tax experts.
Collaborated with the team under a tight deadline to integrate a new video/screenshare SDK alongside the older vendor, building an abstraction layer to facilitate its future deprecation.
Supported Jetpack Compose migration across multiple assets owned by VEP, driving modernization of the UI layer with proper state management and recomposition patterns.

ol.title: One Intuit Contact Us SDK
ul: Owned the Intuit-wide “Contact Us” mobile SDK, providing end-to-end support and maintenance for internal partner teams and ensuring code quality with peer reviews.
Refactored the SDK to an MVI architecture to facilitate future Compose migration and implemented deeplinking, achieving a 7% increase in clickthrough rate.
Migrated chat experience by integrating a GenAI widget that bridges AI with HI for tax filing assistance.

list.heading: Member Technical Staff - Android, Zoho Corporation

ol.title: Kotlin Multiplatform SDK
ul: Developed a Kotlin Multiplatform library for Zoho CRM's shared domain and data layers with network services using Ktor and Koin DI, ensuring seamless functionality across Android, iOS, and macOS platforms.

Conducted in-depth KMP performance and interop analysis on Android and iOS, identifying critical performance bottlenecks and interop issues in the early alpha stage, informing the team's adoption strategy.
Enforced separation of concerns, unidirectional data flow, and Clean Architecture principles to improve code maintainability, resulting in a 30% reduction in development time.

ol.title: Database Migration Tool
ul: Built a database migration tool using Gradle, Kotlin, and XML schema parsing to automate SQL DDL query generation at compile time for Android, iOS, and macOS platforms.
Integrated migration in CI/CD to boost developer productivity, cutting database maintenance and testing workloads by 25%.

ol.title: Use Case Testing Framework
ul: Created a robust framework for Use Case Testing in the domain and data layer, improving testing efficiency and reducing reliance on manual testing by 60%, using JUnit parameterized tests for data-driven testing, MockK for dependency mocking, and Espresso for UI automation.

resume.heading: Education
ul: B.E CSE at SRM Easwari Engineering College, Chennai | 8.86 CGPA with distinction (2018 - 2022)

list.heading: Testing
ul: UI automation using Espresso and Compose Test Tags
